betOfDay.analysis: Rockets at home vs the Raptors — one of the worst teams in the East. Houston has been one of the most consistent covers all season long, dominating at Toyota Center. Toronto is in full rebuild mode with nothing to play for. The -4.5 is consistent across FanDuel and DraftKings. Sharp money hasn't moved this line, which means it's right where it should be. Lay the points confidently.

picks.reasoning: Rockets are one of the hottest teams in the West and dominant at home all season. Raptors are a bottom-tier rebuild squad with no defensive identity on the road. Line is -4.5 across all major books — sharps haven't moved it. Best game on the slate.

Warriors at home -6 vs a Bulls squad that struggles on the road. Curry elevates Chase Center into one of the toughest road environments in the league. Bulls don't have the firepower to keep up. 6 points feels right.
Wolves have one of the best defenses in the league. Favored by 2.5 on the road — that's a slight ask, but Minnesota's defensive identity stifles Lakers' transition game. Tight 1-unit lean.

Jets are one of the top teams in the NHL this season and dominant at Canada Life Centre. Ducks are one of the worst teams in the league — young rebuild squad. Jets -1.5 puck line is absolutely justified here.

research.nba: Tuesday slate — 7 NBA games. Top of the slate kicks off at 6:10 PM MT. Big late game: Wolves @ Lakers at 9:10 PM. Conference race heating up with 3-4 weeks left in the regular season.
research.nhl: 5 NHL games tonight including a big Oilers @ Avalanche matchup at 8:10 PM. Jets -1.5 vs Ducks is the value play.
